eyebrow.zh: 窗口又满了？先看清是谁在占
eyebrow.en: Window full again? See who's eating it

headline.zh:
别再猜是谁
吃掉了你的上下文
headline.en:
Stop guessing who
ate your context

sub.zh: 给 Claude Code 用的工具 —— 把笼统的 token 总数拆成你实际装进去的东西（skills、MCP、读进来的文件、推理、输出），告诉你该卸掉哪个，而不是下次会话再撞一次墙。
sub.en: A tool for Claude Code — splits the flat token total into the things you actually loaded (skills, MCP, files you pulled in, reasoning, output), so you know what to unload instead of hitting the same wall next session.

body.zh: 会话快满的时候，它把占用最大的那些东西（某个 skill、某个 MCP、读进来的某个文件）按大小列出来，每个都标了占窗口的份额 —— 你知道该删谁，而不是瞎猜或全删重来。
body.en: When a session nears full, it ranks the biggest consumers (a skill, an MCP, a file you pulled in) by size, each tagged with its share of the window — so you trim the right one instead of guessing or nuking everything.

chips: › each one's share of the window

title.zh: 看着上下文一点点被吃掉
title.en: Watch your context get eaten over time

body.zh: 它能横着对比你最近几次会话，让你一眼看到哪一类东西（skills、MCP、文件）在悄悄越长越大 —— 在它把窗口撑爆之前，先把它卸了。
body.en: It compares your recent sessions side by side, so you can see at a glance which kind of thing (skills, MCP, files) is quietly growing — and unload it before it blows the window.

chips: › spot the creep before it blows

title.zh: 这次和上次，到底差在哪
title.en: What actually changed between two runs

body.zh: 对比任意两次会话，告诉你每一类东西各涨了多少、哪些具体项目变大了 —— 精确找到是什么让这次比上次更挤。
body.en: Diff any two sessions and see how much each kind of thing grew, plus which specific items moved — so you pinpoint exactly what made this run tighter than the last.

title.en: Looks only — never touches your sessions

body.zh: 它只读你本地的会话记录，给出诊断 —— 从不编辑、改写或替你做决定。你看完决定卸什么，它帮你看见，不帮你动手。
body.en: It only reads your local session logs and gives you a diagnosis — it never edits, rewrites, or decides for you. It shows you what's there; you decide what to cut.

headline.zh: 给你的上一次会话算笔账

sub.zh: MIT 许可，一条命令装好 —— 自动找到你 ~/.claude/projects/ 里的会话，不用手动指。
sub.en: MIT-licensed, one command to install — auto-finds the sessions under ~/.claude/projects/, no manual pointing needed.
